Cosmoteer.Bullets.BulletRules.ID: Identifier that must be unique across the game.
Cosmoteer.Bullets.BulletRules.OtherIDs: Legacy identifiers. You shouldn't normally need these.
Cosmoteer.Bullets.BulletRules.Range: How far the target can be when the projectile is shot at it.
Cosmoteer.Bullets.BulletRules.IdealRange: The range from which the AI will try to use this weapon.
Cosmoteer.Bullets.BulletRules.Speed: How fast the projectile moves forward when spawned.
Cosmoteer.Bullets.BulletRules.RandomRotation: Whether the projectile spawns facing a random direction.

Cosmoteer.Ships.Parts.PartRules.NameKey: The part's name, displayed when it is selected or hovered over.
Cosmoteer.Ships.Parts.PartRules.IconNameKey: The part name as it shows up in the ship editor's menus.
Cosmoteer.Ships.Parts.PartRules.ID: Game-wide unique ID of the part. Must start with the author's name.
Cosmoteer.Ships.Parts.PartRules.OtherIDs: Alternate part identifiers this part also answers to.
Cosmoteer.Ships.Parts.PartRules.FlipWhenLoadingIDs: Part IDs that trigger flipping when the ship is loaded.
Cosmoteer.Ships.Parts.PartRules.EditorGroups: The names of the ship-editor tabs the part appears in.
Cosmoteer.Ships.Parts.PartRules.EditorGroup: The name of the ship-editor tab the part appears in.
Cosmoteer.Ships.Parts.PartRules.IsBuildable: If false, the part cannot be built.
Cosmoteer.Ships.Parts.PartRules.Resources: Resource name and cost pairs defining what the part costs to build.
Cosmoteer.Ships.Parts.PartRules.FractionalCostToRepair: How much of the build cost, at most, is spent to repair the part to full health.
Cosmoteer.Ships.Parts.PartRules.Size: The width and height of the part, in tiles.
Cosmoteer.Ships.Parts.PartRules.Density: How much one tile of the part weighs, in tons.
Cosmoteer.Ships.Parts.PartRules.MaxHealth: How much damage the part can endure before being destroyed.
Cosmoteer.Ships.Parts.PartRules.HealthType: The part's health category. See the HealthTypes reference.
Cosmoteer.Ships.Parts.PartRules.HasNonContiguousPathing: Set to true if some tiles of the part cannot be walked across by crew in a given direction.
Cosmoteer.Ships.Parts.PartRules.CrewSpeedFactor: The speed at which crew move within the part.
Cosmoteer.Ships.Parts.PartRules.CrewCongestedSpeedFactor: The speed at which crew move within the part while passing other crew.
Cosmoteer.Ships.Parts.PartRules.SelectionTypeByRotation: If true, double-clicking the part in-game only selects parts of the same type facing the same direction.
Cosmoteer.Ships.Parts.PartRules.IsExternal: If false, the part must have either no doors to anything else or only doors with legal placement.
Cosmoteer.Ships.Parts.PartRules.IsRotateable: Whether the part can be rotated during placement.
Cosmoteer.Ships.Parts.PartRules.IsFlippable: Whether the part can be flipped during placement.
Cosmoteer.Ships.Parts.PartRules.IsWalled: If false, the part can only have doors to parts that are themselves not walled.
Cosmoteer.Ships.Parts.PartRules.FlipHRotate: The rotation mapping applied when the part is flipped horizontally.
Cosmoteer.Ships.Parts.PartRules.FlipVRotate: The rotation mapping applied when the part is flipped vertically.
Cosmoteer.Ships.Parts.PartRules.AIValueFactor: How much the AI wants to destroy this part on ships it considers enemies.
Cosmoteer.Ships.Parts.PartRules.MinBuffValues: Per-buff minimum values this part clamps received buffs to.
Cosmoteer.Ships.Parts.PartRules.MaxBuffValues: Per-buff maximum values this part clamps received buffs to.
Cosmoteer.Ships.Parts.PartRules.TypeCategories: Part-category identifiers used to classify the part.
Cosmoteer.Ships.Parts.PartRules.SelectionPriority: Determines selection ordering when parts overlap.
Cosmoteer.Ships.Parts.PartRules.SelectionTypeID: Part ID used to group parts together for selection.
Cosmoteer.Ships.Parts.PartRules.JobsIcon: Sprite shown for the part's job assignments.
